pages.text:
Reasoning
Q1
Directions:Study the following informations
carefully and answer the questions given
below.
 
Eight shelves are stacked one above another
such that each shelf has a different shaped solid
on it. The torus is kept immediately above the
cube. As many shelves are above the cube as
many are below the torus. Two shelves are in
between the cube and the sphere. The diamond
is kept immediately below the sphere. Two
shelves are in between the diamond and the
pyramid. The prism is kept immediately above
the cylinder. The cone is kept above the prism.
 
How many shelves are above the cone?
(A) Two
(B) Three
(C) Zero
(D) More than three
(E) One
Q2
Directions:Study the following informations
carefully and answer the questions given
below.
 
Eight shelves are stacked one above another
such that each shelf has a different shaped solid
on it. The torus is kept immediately above the
cube. As many shelves are above the cube as
many are below the torus. Two shelves are in
between the cube and the sphere. The diamond
is kept immediately below the sphere. Two
shelves are in between the diamond and the
pyramid. The prism is kept immediately above
the cylinder. The cone is kept above the prism.
 
If all the solids are arranged in the dictionary
order of their names from top to bottom, then
which of the following solids will retain their
original position in the stack?
I. prism
II. cone
III. pyramid
(A) Only III
(B) Only I and II
(C) Only II
(D) Only I
(E) Only II and III
Q3
Directions:Study the following informations
carefully and answer the questions given
below.
 
Eight shelves are stacked one above another
such that each shelf has a different shaped solid
on it. The torus is kept immediately above the
cube. As many shelves are above the cube as
many are below the torus. Two shelves are in
between the cube and the sphere. The diamond
is kept immediately below the sphere. Two
shelves are in between the diamond and the
pyramid. The prism is kept immediately above
the cylinder. The cone is kept above the prism.
 
Which of the following is kept below the sixth
shelf from the top?
(A) cone
(B) prism
(C) cube
(D) diamond
(E) sphere
Q4
Directions:Study the following informations
carefully and answer the questions given
below.
 
 
Box Puzzle
Level-1

Eight shelves are stacked one above another
such that each shelf has a different shaped solid
on it. The torus is kept immediately above the
cube. As many shelves are above the cube as
many are below the torus. Two shelves are in
between the cube and the sphere. The diamond
is kept immediately below the sphere. Two
shelves are in between the diamond and the
pyramid. The prism is kept immediately above
the cylinder. The cone is kept above the prism.
 
Which of the following shape is kept just above
the torus ?
(A) Prism
(B) Diamond
(C) Pyramid
(D) Cone
(E) Sphere
Q5
Directions:Study the following informations
carefully and answer the questions given
below.
 
Eight shelves are stacked one above another
such that each shelf has a different shaped solid
on it. The torus is kept immediately above the
cube. As many shelves are above the cube as
many are below the torus. Two shelves are in
between the cube and the sphere. The diamond
is kept immediately below the sphere. Two
shelves are in between the diamond and the
pyramid. The prism is kept immediately above
the cylinder. The cone is kept above the prism.
 
Which solid is kept immediately below the
cylinder?
(A) Diamond
(B) Pyramid
(C) Torus
(D) None 
(E) Sphere
Q6
Read the information given below carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
 
Eight boxes i.e. B, U, I, E, Q, O, R, and W are
placed one above the other but not necessarily
in the same order. Three boxes are placed
between B and W. B is placed either at the
topmost or bottommost position. Box I is placed
just above box U. Box W is placed just above box
R. There are two boxes placed between O and R.
Not more than two boxes are placed between B
and O. More than three boxes are placed
between I and E.
 
Four of the following five are alike in a certain
way and hence form a group. Find out the one
that does not belong to that group.
(A) B and Q
(B) E and W
(C) O and R
(D) U and I
(E) U and W
Q7
Read the information given below carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
 
Eight boxes i.e. B, U, I, E, Q, O, R, and W are
placed one above the other but not necessarily
in the same order. Three boxes are placed
between B and W. B is placed either at the
topmost or bottommost position. Box I is placed
just above box U. Box W is placed just above box
R. There are two boxes placed between O and R.
Not more than two boxes are placed between B
and O. More than three boxes are placed
between I and E.
 
How many boxes are placed between I and R?
(A) Five
(B) Four
(C) Three
(D) Two
(E) None
Q8
Read the information given below carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
 
Eight boxes i.e. B, U, I, E, Q, O, R, and W are
placed one above the other but not necessarily
in the same order. Three boxes are placed
between B and W. B is placed either at the

topmost or bottommost position. Box I is placed
just above box U. Box W is placed just above box
R. There are two boxes placed between O and R.
Not more than two boxes are placed between B
and O. More than three boxes are placed
between I and E.
 
The number of boxes placed above the box I is
same as the number of boxes placed below the
box?
(A) U
(B) Q
(C) E
(D) W
(E) R
Q9
Read the information given below carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
 
Eight boxes i.e. B, U, I, E, Q, O, R, and W are
placed one above the other but not necessarily
in the same order. Three boxes are placed
between B and W. B is placed either at the
topmost or bottommost position. Box I is placed
just above box U. Box W is placed just above box
R. There are two boxes placed between O and R.
Not more than two boxes are placed between B
and O. More than three boxes are placed
between I and E.
 
The number of boxes placed between E and R is
same as the number of boxes placed between
___ and O?
(A) Z
(B) I
(C) B
(D) W
(E) None of these
Q10
Read the information given below carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
 
Eight boxes i.e. B, U, I, E, Q, O, R, and W are
placed one above the other but not necessarily
in the same order. Three boxes are placed
between B and W. B is placed either at the
topmost or bottommost position. Box I is placed
just above box U. Box W is placed just above box
R. There are two boxes placed between O and R.
Not more than two boxes are placed between B
and O. More than three boxes are placed
between I and E.
 
Which of the following box is placed third from
the top?
(A) B
(B) R
(C) O
(D) E
(E) Q
Q11
Directions: Study the following information
carefully and answer the question given below.
In a general store seven boxes of different names
are kept. They are: A, B, C, D, E, F, and G. Each box
has a number written on it from 1 to 7 but not
essentially in the same order. The boxes are
arranged in ascending order with the lowest
number on the bottom.Box B is immediately
above the box E. E is place on an odd number.
Two boxes are kept between B and D. Not more
than one box is put down between D and A, in
which D is placed above A. Two boxes are kept
between E and C. The box G is placed
immediately below box E but not immediately
above the box F.
Which of the following condition is true?
(A) C - 7th
(B) F - 1st
(C) G - 6th
(D) A - 3rd
(E) B - 6th
Q12
Directions: 
Study 
the 
following
information carefully and answer the question
given below.
In a general store seven boxes of different names
are kept. They are: A, B, C, D, E, F, and G. Each box
has a number written on it from 1 to 7 but not
essentially in the same order. The boxes are
arranged in ascending order with the lowest
number on the Bottom.Box B is immediately

above the box E. E is place on an odd number.
Two boxes are kept between B and D. Not more
than one box is put down between D and A, in
which D is placed above A. Two boxes are kept
between E and C. The box G is placed
immediately below box E but not immediately
above the box F.
Which box is kept between box D and A?
(A) G
(B) C
(C) B
(D) E
(E) None of these
Q13
Directions: 
Study 
the 
following
information carefully and answer the question
given below.
In a general store seven boxes of different names
are kept. They are: A, B, C, D, E, F, and G. Each box
has a number written on it from 1 to 7 but not
essentially in the parallel order. The boxes are
arranged in a pile in ascending order with the
lowest 
number 
on 
the 
bottom.Box 
B 
is
immediately above the box E. E is place on an
odd number. Two boxes are kept between B and
D. Not more than one box is put down between D
and A, in which D is placed above A. Two boxes
are kept between E and C. The box G is placed
immediately below box E but not immediately
above the box F
Box G is which number box?
(A) 3rd
(B) 6th
(C) 4th
(D) 5th
(E) None of these

In a general store seven boxes of different names
are kept. They are: A, B, C, D, E, F, and G. Each box

essentially in the parallel order. The boxes are

immediately below box E but not immediately
above the box F
How many boxes are there between box B and
C?
(A) 2
(B) 5
(C) 4
(D) 3
(E) None of these
Q15
Directions: 
Study 
the 
following
information carefully and answer the question

In a general store seven boxes of different names
are kept. They are: A, B, C, D, E, F, and G. Each box

essentially in the parallel order. The boxes are

Which box is at the bottom?
(A) A
(B) D

(D) E
(E) B

Hints & Solutions
Q1
Text Solution:
The torus is kept immediately above the cube. As
many shelves are above the cube as many are
below the torus. Two shelves are in between the
cube and the sphere. So, we get two possible
cases:
Shapes
Shapes
Case 1
Case 2
 
 
 
Sphere
 
 
Torus
Torus
Cube

Sphere
 
 
The diamond is kept immediately below the
sphere. So, case 1 is ruled out here.

Sphere
 
Diamond
Torus

Cube
Cube
 
 
 
 
Sphere
 
 
Two shelves are in between the diamond and the
pyramid. The prism is kept immediately above
the cylinder. The cone is kept above the prism.
Hence, the final arrangement is: -
Shapes
Cone
Sphere
Diamond
Torus
Cube
Pyramid
Prism
Cylinder
